# Project coding instructions

## Scope
- This workspace is a beginner-focused Java learning web app.
- Keep explanations simple and student-friendly.
- Prefer minimal, clear changes over advanced abstractions.

## Java backend
- Use Java 21 and Maven conventions.
- Keep server logic in small methods with readable names.
- Validate user input for API endpoints.
- Avoid adding heavy frameworks unless explicitly requested.

## Frontend
- Use semantic HTML.
- Keep CSS simple and readable.
- Use plain JavaScript with clear variable names.
- Keep pages fast and easy to navigate from the menu.

## Guide content style
- Mirror the practical style: hardcoded example and user-input example
	when useful.
- Keep code snippets copy-paste friendly.
- Highlight common beginner mistakes briefly.

## Quality
- Make focused edits only.
- Preserve existing file structure unless a change is required.
- Update README when behavior or run steps change.
